name: Ruflo Intelligence - Post-Execution Learning Cycle
description: RuVector intelligence cycle extracting patterns, updating ReasoningBank, and adapting SONA after task completion

steps: pattern-extraction (mine CRDT and WebSocket patterns from execution)
reasoning-retrieve (search ReasoningBank for similar collaborative editing trajectories)
reasoning-judge (evaluate trajectory applicability to current CRDT context)
reasoning-distill (compress and store new CRDT merge strategy entries)
sona-adapt (update weights with EWC++ regularization, check forgetting risk)
knowledge-graph (add nodes for CRDT patterns, run PageRank)
vector-embedding (HNSW index update for new patterns)
